title: Flaky Rich Saudi Yogurt Crumble
description: A rich and flaky post-workout dish featuring creme fraiche, perfect for those who enjoy a halal-friendly snack after their workout.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the Greek yogurt, creme fraiche, sugar, and salt. Mix until well combined.
If using nuts, mix them in as well. Otherwise, proceed to the next step.
Using your hands or a pastry blender, work the mixture into a crumbly texture by incorporating the walnuts (or almonds) if used.
Generously sprinkle the crumble mixture onto a baking dish that has been lightly greased with oil and dusted with flour for easy removal.
Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly before serving.
